subject: [PATCH 1/3] mm/swap: revert to single-folio writes for synchronous swap devices

reviews.author: Christoph Hellwig
reviews.summary: Confirmed the need to include the new header in zswap.c and acknowledged a buildbot reminder.

2026-07-23.patch_summary: Proposal to add a new swap_ops.h header for pluggable swap operations, including zswap.
